title: Shriram Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Shriram Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Shriram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Shriram Finance:
Shriram Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance!
